raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 711 creates a framework for an Associate Degree in Blockchain Technologies.",
    "The lack of skilled teaching talent or official blockchain coursework hinders individuals from learning blockchain skills.",
    "Students are self-organizing in unofficial clubs to learn blockchain skills due to the lack of a standardized, high-quality curriculum.",
    "Official blockchain coursework may include subjects like programming, coding, finance, and blockchain services.",
    "Incorporating an ethics course in blockchain curriculum can reduce the number of bad actors in the industry.",
    "Average entry-level jobs in the blockchain sector pay around $117,000.",
    "High-paying jobs in the blockchain sector are difficult for low-income rural communities of color to access due to the required skill set.",
    "Providing economic opportunities in historically disadvantaged communities can diversify local economies and expand the tax base."
  ]
}
```
